title: Mushroom Paleo Puff
description: An earthy and flaky Canadian dish featuring mushrooms, cooked using sous-vide technique for a paleo-friendly post-workout snack.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add diced onion and minced garlic, sauté for about 3 minutes until translucent.
Add sliced mushrooms and cook until they start to brown, about 8-10 minutes. Remove from heat.
In a mixing bowl, combine cooked mushrooms, lemon zest, thyme leaves, coconut aminos (or tamari), and sesame seeds. Mix well.
Transfer the mixture into a silicone mold or any desired container for puffing. Place in preheated sous-vide at 57°C for about 1 hour.
Remove from sous-vide and allow to cool slightly before unmolding onto a serving plate.
